H1.name: Compatibility strength > 0.70
H1.details: All sectors exceed 0.70 at depths 1-12; projection remains above 0.70 through depth 20; antisymmetry and neutral fall below at depth 20

H2.name: Interference drift < 0.30
H2.details: All sectors remain below 0.30 threshold across all depths; maximum interference 0.1998 at neutral depth 20

H3.name: Compatibility retention > 0.80
H3.details: Projection maintains > 0.80 through depth 12; antisymmetry through depth 8; neutral fails at depth 8

H4.name: RG stability > 0.90
H4.details: RG similarity peaks at 0.9656 (projection, depth 1); never exceeds 0.90 beyond depth 3; falls to 0.8456 at neutral depth 20

H5.name: All sectors nonzero compatibility through maximum depth
H5.details: All sectors maintain nonzero compatibility across all depths
